49.reason: [The variable 'len' is uninitialized. It is declared but never assigned the length of the string, leading to undefined behavior when used in the loop condition.]

54.reason: [When i=0, s[i-1] accesses s[-1], which is out-of-bounds. Similarly, when i is the last index, s[i+1] may access beyond the string. Also, the loop runs with uninitialized 'len', compounding the issue.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [When i=0, s[i-1] accesses s[-1], which is out-of-bounds. Similarly, when i is the last index, s[i+1] may access beyond the string. Also, the loop runs with uninitialized 'len', compounding the issue.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Potential out-of-bounds access: when i=0, s[i-1] accesses s[-1], which is invalid; similarly, if '-' is at the last character, s[i+1] reads beyond the string. Also, no check ensures that '-' is not at the start or end of the string.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [When i=0, s[i-1] accesses s[-1], which is out-of-bounds. Similarly, when i is the last index, s[i+1] may access beyond the string. The code does not check bounds before accessing adjacent characters.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Potential out-of-bounds access: when i=0, s[i-1] accesses s[-1]; when i is the last index, s[i+1] accesses beyond the string. Also, no check if '-' is at start or end of string.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Potential out-of-bounds access: when i=0, s[i-1] accesses s[-1]; when i is the last index, s[i+1] may be out of bounds. Also, no check for '-' at string boundaries.]
